历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022 (Science), the minimum ranking was approximately 3183 → 2023 approximately 4502 → 2024 approximately 3293 → 2025 (Physics Category) approximately 15726 (including low-score major group 0A2). In 2025, there was a significant backward shift, mainly due to the addition of low-score major groups, with a baseline of approximately 15726; the university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for Physics Category: 15 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 14 in 2024, 18 in 2025; 22 planned for 2026, an increase of about 22.2% compared to 2025, and the significant increase in enrollment places has somewhat eased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science China University Rankings: 65th in 2021 → 66th in 2022 → 67th in 2023 → 71st in 2024 → 62nd in 2025 → 57th in 2026, with rankings steadily recovering in recent years, and the university's comprehensive strength and recognition steadily improving; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics incidents), but the impact of the incident was limited; Douyin popularity ranking 73rd, evaluation average, moderate exposure on short video platforms; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Law A, Applied Economics A-, both are the university's flagship disciplines; Law is a member of the "Five Academies and Four Departments", with significant disciplinary advantages among finance, economics, and law institutions, and is also attractive to Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science is highly recommended with social heat, electronic information/communication is highly recommended, law is moderately hot, finance/economics/economic is differentiated and wait-and-see; total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia college entrance examination is about 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (History Category 21,406 + Physics Category 44,491 ≈ 65,897), and the competition pattern is generally stable; 2026. 7. [Regional Factor] Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is located in Wuhan, Hubei, belonging to the central region, which is a cross-province study for Ningxia candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Ningxia.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings mainly due to low-score major groups, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 22.2% easing competition, and the university's Soft Science ranking continuously recovering to 57th enhancing attractiveness, on the basis of the 2025 baseline of 15726, the ranking is expected to recover somewhat (number decreases); however, considering that the 2026 Physics Category enrollment majors include new popular majors such as Computer Science (requires Chemistry), the overall ranking will still be higher than the normal level in previous years; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17623, with a range of 17123–18123.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 17000), you can focus on trying for Tier 1 flagship majors.
